name: attack_with_bow
description: Engage nearest hostile mob with bow while kiting if health gets low
parameters: z.object({ engageDistanceBlocks: z.number().int().min(5).max(30).default(10).describe("Desired distance to maintain from the target while shooting"), kiteHealthThreshold: z.number().int().min(0).max(20).default(15).describe("Health level at which the bot prioritizes maintaining maximum distance or retreating"), maxSearchRadiusBlocks: z.number().int().min(5).max(64).default(24).describe("Maximum distance to search for a hostile target"), maxShots: z.number().int().min(1).max(64).default(10).describe("Maximum number of arrows to fire before the task completes"), holdDrawMs: z.number().int().min(600).max(1400).default(1000).describe("Active milliseconds to draw the bow before firing"), targetEntityId: z.number().int().optional().describe("Optional specific entity ID to hunt; if omitted, the nearest hostile is chosen") })
